entries.message: V1.37 Novel Writing Foundation SHIPPED (2026-06-08) via PR #47 → main. 5 plans archived under Profile B (snapshot files at .mstar/archived/plans/<plan-id>.json + minimal entries in .mstar/archived/plans-done.json; status.json.plans[] empty). P0 foundation-first: gate_evaluator + AddScheduleRequest.input + scaffold atomicity + --force-gates audit + novel-writing gates §5.3.2 — full implementation with QC tri-review + QA Approval (6/6 ACs, 981 tests, all CI gates clean). P1/P2/P3 spec/roadmap-only: multi-chapter chronology (DF-62), World KB continuity (DF-63), quality-loop backplane (DF-64/65/66/67) — single QC each, all Approve. Closed residuals: R-V136P1-01, R-V136P1-02, R-V136P3-02. Opened residual: R-V137P0-01 (serde strict-mode for misplaced YAML keys, low). Latest active compass: V1.37 (Shipped); next iteration (V1.38) TBD. Tracker/compass/iterations README/shipped archive all updated.
Phase 0 plans execute on main branch for initialization. V1.0-phase1+ plans require feature branches.
Phase 0 complete: monorepo-structure, json-schema-foundation, codegen-pipeline all done. 15 commits on main. Ready for Phase 1.
V1.0-phase1 Wave 0-1.5 complete: Architecture review, domain-models implementation (15 aggregates, 133 tests), QC三审, Critical fixes (C-1, C-2) verified.
domain-models merged to main. Residual findings recorded for cli-daemon-foundation, sync-contract, acp-client, context-assembly, and domain-models (non-blocking QC items).

V1.0-phase1 Wave 2 architecture review complete. cli-daemon-foundation and sync-contract plans expanded. CLI-R1..R4, SYNC-R1..R3 upgraded from 'defer' to 'resolve'. Implementation order: cli-daemon → sync-contract → acp-client → context-assembly.

Clarify phase complete. 4 future iteration points recorded as residual findings (CLI-R5..R8): Unix socket support, manuscript promote strict mode, manuscript verify content checks, research scan content extraction. Ready for implementation.

ACP Client tech spec refined by @architect. SDK choice: agent-client-protocol v0.10.4. 6 tasks defined with parallel execution plan. ACP-R1/R2 resolved, 9 new V1.1+ residuals (ACP-R3..R11) added. Plan status: InProgress.

ACP Client Integration merged to main. 29 files changed, 6,638 insertions, 6 commits + merge. QC三审 APPROVE (ACP-C1/C2/H1 fixed). QA CONDITIONAL PASS. 312+ tests passing. 19 residuals tracked for V1.1. Context Assembly plan unblocked.

V1.0-phase1 complete (8/8 plans Done). V1.0-phase1 architecture + product reviews completed. 36 arch findings, 37 feature analysis. P0 bug fixes in progress on fix/v1.0-p0-bugs. Pre-Phase 2 consolidated plan created (2026-04-06-pre-phase2.md) with 5 implementation plans (A-E). 5 V1.0-phase2 plan entries added to status.json.
Cleaned up 7 stale residuals resolved by Plan A: CLI-R9..R14 (6 HIGH) closed, DEBT-X4 closed. CLI-R15 updated as partially resolved. Archived to archived/residuals/. Total open: 49 → 42.

V1.1 tech debt mitigation plan created (2026-04-08-v1.1-tech-debt-mitigation.md) based on architecture gap analysis. 3-wave approach: Wave 1 (P0 — DM-R5 + 3 schemas), Wave 2 (P1 — ACP/Research/Manuscript/Context), Wave 3 (P2 — DEBT-X/SYNC-R/FH-R). Total: 27 residuals + 3 missing features. nexus-platform V1.0-phase2 confirmed complete.
DM-R5 resolved: MembershipRole enum aligned with v1-spec §5.4, §7 (Owner/Maintainer/Collaborator/OfficialCreator). Permission methods updated. Contracts regenerated. Total open residuals: 42 → 41.

V1.1 Wave 1 complete: DM-R5 resolved (MembershipRole aligned), 3 schemas created (delta/workspace-binding/agent-profile), W1-C1 fixed (AgentProfile enums), QC三审 APPROVE. 7 commits, 662 tests passing, 25 schemas valid. Ready for merge.
Wave 1 merged to main: DM-R5 resolved, 3 schemas created, W1-C1 fixed, QC APPROVE. 59 files, 4102 insertions. Ready for Wave 2.

CTX-R6 resolved: MemoryKind enum expanded from 4 to 8 variants matching schema (ADR-001). Added strum::Display, FromStr implementation. CLI commands updated to use enum. Total open residuals: 41 → 40.
Wave 2 Batch 1 complete: 8 tasks (ACP session/policy/daemon-mediated + Context Assembly 5 residuals). All tests passing. Batch 2 pending.

Wave 2 Batch 1 merged to main: QC三审 APPROVE (consolidated: 0 Critical, 5 Warnings, 10 Suggestions). 10 commits, 23 files (3086 insertions). Residuals: ACP-R7 resolved, CTX-R2/R4/R5/R6/R7 resolved. Ready for Batch 2 in new session.

Wave 2 Batch 2 (Tasks 8-10) complete: CLI-R6 (manuscript strict mode), CLI-R7 (content verify), CLI-R8 (research extraction) resolved. 1 commit, 7 files (819 insertions), 232 tests passing. Total open residuals: 40 → 37.

Wave 2 Batch 2 extended (Tasks 16-18): SYNC-R6 (precheck auth match validation), SYNC-R11 (honor retry_after from conflict), SYNC-R12 (persist partial apply retry state) resolved. 1 commit, 6 files (837 insertions), 94 nexus-sync tests passing. Total open residuals: 37 → 34.

Wave 2 Batch 2 merged to main: QC三审 APPROVE (unanimous: 0 Critical, 6 Warnings). 4 commits, 14 files (1710 insertions). Residuals: CLI-R6/R7/R8/SYNC-R6/R11/R12 resolved. Wave 2 complete (14/14 tasks). Ready for Wave 3.

Wave 3 Batch A merged to main: QC三审 APPROVE (0 Critical, 8 Warnings). 8 QC Warnings (W-1 through W-8) tracked as residuals for V1.1+. Total open residuals: 29 → 37. Progress: 90% (23/26 tasks complete). Ready for Batch B.

Wave 3 Batch B complete: FH-R1 (schema drift detection CI), FH-R3 (error code inconsistency docs), FH-R6 (test helper duplication). Added schema-drift-check CI job, documented Internal.code vs error_code() design, created test_utils.rs module. 62 nexus42d tests, all workspace tests passing. InReview for QC.

Wave 3 Batch B QC三审 APPROVE (unanimous: 0 Critical, 3 Warnings, 6 Suggestions). All 26 tasks complete. FH-R1/R3/R6 resolved. 11 QC Warnings (W1-W11) tracked for V1.1+. Ready for merge to main. V1.1 GA ready.
V1.1 Tech Debt Mitigation complete. Created V1.2 Tech Debt Cleanup plan for 21 warning-level residuals. Archived 15 Done plans to archived/plans/.
V1.1 Tech Debt Mitigation complete. Created V1.1 Tech Debt Cleanup 2 plan for 21 warning-level residuals. Archived 15 Done plans.

Updated tech_debt_summary per plan-convention.md: severity stats now treat historical 'warning' as 'low' (11 QC-Warnings from v1.1-tech-debt-mitigation). by_plan keys aligned with residual_findings keys (full plan-id). Added severity_note for transparency.

Major status.json cleanup per plan-convention.md: (1) Archived 15 closed residuals to archived/residuals/*.json (DM-R5, CLI-R6/R7/R8, SYNC-R4/R5/R6/R11/R12, ACP-R7, CTX-R6/R7, FH-R1/R3/R6). (2) Migrated metadata.notes to notes.json to reduce status.json size. (3) Updated tech_debt_summary to reflect 31 open residuals. All changes follow §248-286 (archival) and §105 (notes.json) of plan-convention.md.

Compressed 15 Done plans per plan-convention.md §390-400: Removed redundant metadata fields (qc_status, tests, commits, etc.) and added archived_record pointers to archived/plans/*.json snapshots. Status.json reduced from 40.7KB to 26.4KB (-35%). Plans with open residuals retained residual_summary field.

Ultra-compressed 15 Done plans per plan-convention.md §430-436: Reduced from 13 fields to 6 fields (id, status, file, metadata, title, done_at). Removed redundant fields (owner, agents, progress, tags, created_at, updated_at, notes) now available in archived/plans/*.json snapshots. status.json size: 26.4KB → 20.0KB (-24.5%).

v1-tech-debt-cleanup Batch D closed (TD-7 resolve; TD-8/10 waive + knowledge; TD-9 minimal GET /v1/local/daemon/status). Milestone snapshot later kept as archived/plans/v1-tech-debt-cleanup-milestone-cd-2026-04-10.json; Batch D residuals archived/residuals/v1-tech-debt-cleanup-batch-d.json; qc_self reports/v1-tech-debt-cleanup/v1-tech-debt-cleanup-qc-self-20260410-batch-d.md. (Plan later restored InProgress 2026-04-11 — see next entry.)

v1-tech-debt-cleanup restored to InProgress: long-term V1.x maintenance plan — Batch D is a completed milestone only; Batch E (V1.2) and follow-ons stay under this plan id. Milestone snapshot renamed to archived/plans/v1-tech-debt-cleanup-milestone-cd-2026-04-10.json (removed archived_record from live row).

Resolved residual SYNC-AUTH-TOKEN-01 (plan 2026-04-10-cli-sync-bidirectional-parity): SyncClient validate_auth_token now allows standard Base64 +/=; archived/residuals/2026-04-10-cli-sync-bidirectional-parity.json; qc_self reports/2026-04-10-cli-sync-bidirectional-parity/2026-04-10-cli-sync-bidirectional-parity-qc-self-20260411.md.

Plan 2026-04-11-codegen-ref-resolution Done: codegen resolves common $ref string-pattern defs and whole-schema refs; Rust/TS generated types for publish/fork/sync-pull/explore-feed; closed PUBLISH-CODEGEN-01 and FORK-SNAP-01 → archived/residuals/2026-04-10-cli-publish-workflow-parity.json and archived/residuals/2026-04-10-cli-fork-world-snapshot-parity.json; tech_debt_summary open count 0; qc_self reports/2026-04-11-codegen-ref-resolution/2026-04-11-codegen-ref-resolution-qc-self-20260411.md.

Plan 2026-04-10-local-fs-layout-ssot-and-implementation Done: ADR-014 paths (nexus-home-layout), init + creator workspace create, nexus42d config-driven state.db, README local layout; legacy/migrate paths later removed (pre-release). T1 SSOT doc checklist remains manual via local-paths.json.

Policy update: avoid metadata.*_note fields in .mstar/status.json. Moved previous tech_debt_summary severity_note and archival_note narrative into notes.json. Keep status.json focused on machine-readable structured fields; write timeline/context notes here.

Carried-over note (from former metadata.tech_debt_summary.severity_note): v1-tech-debt-cleanup remains InProgress (long-lived), C+D milestone done 2026-04-10, Batch E (V1.2) pending; cross-plan residual closures include PUBLISH-CODEGEN-01/FORK-SNAP-01 (plan 2026-04-11-codegen-ref-resolution) and SYNC-AUTH-TOKEN-01.

Carried-over note (from former metadata.tech_debt_summary.archival_note): hot status compactions include 2026-04-10 CLI/platform done-row archival set, 2026-04-11 codegen-ref-resolution row compaction, and 2026-04-14 local-fs-layout row compaction to archived/plans/2026-04-10-local-fs-layout-ssot-and-implementation.json.

V1.4 wave-0 specs landed (orchestration-engine-v1, daemon-lifecycle-api-v2, acp-client-tech-spec-v2) + V1.4 delivery compass. Scope covers orchestration foundation + TD-9 closure + ACP worker-delegated hosting amendment.

V1.4 compass scope extended: (a) schemas/ boundary refactor tightened to 'platform HTTP observability only' — local types move to crates/nexus-contracts/src/local/ (schemas-boundary.md); (b) B-track folded in as WS7 — Creator Schedule + immutable versioned core_context (creator-schedule-and-core-context.md) with V1.5 LlmSummarize forward-compat; (c) §10 SSOT allocation matrix formalised.

V1.4 plans registered: 7 plan rows (WS1-WS7) replacing the single legacy V1.3 E2E backlog Todo. The prior 2026-04-17-v1.3-creator-register-e2e-tests row is superseded by 2026-04-17-v1.4-ws6-creator-register-e2e-tests (same work, promoted into V1.4 scope). Each plan file committed at .mstar/plans/2026-04-17-v1.4-wsN-*.md; plan-convention.md metadata fields populated (wave_0_spec, spec_refs, dependency/parallelism, effort_agent_oriented). Execution ordering: WS1 -> {WS2 || WS4 || WS5 || WS6} -> WS3 -> WS7; M1 through M4 + M3b per compass §5.

V1.4 COMPLETE: All 8 workstreams done (WS1-WS7 + sqlx compile-time macro migration added mid-stream). 141+ commits, 302+ files, PR #7. sqlx migration: ~79 runtime queries → compile-time macros across 5 crates, 97 .sqlx/ metadata files, CI verify-sqlx-offline green. AGENTS.md updated with DATABASE_URL convention and .sqlx/ commit/ignore rules. 19 open residual findings (13 medium, 4 low, 2 nit) tracked across 5 plans — all deferred to V1.5+.

V1.5 COMPLETE: All 5 workstreams done (WS-A Schedule FSM hardening, WS-B Orch+DB residual cleanup, WS-C context.summarize capability, WS-D cron/wall-clock triggers, WS-E platform coordination). 25 commits, 47 files, +2848/-492 lines. PR #8. 19 V1.4 residuals resolved and archived. QC三审 consolidated: Approve with residuals (0 Critical, 7 open: 2 medium→V1.6, 4 low→V1.6/V1.7/V2.0, 1 nit→V1.7). Plans archived, status.json cleaned, compass marked Superseded.

V1.6 delivery compass created (iterations/v1.6-delivery-compass-v1.md). 4 tracks: Track A (residual governance R1/R2/R3/R6), Track B (ACP SDK DTO decoupling — 16 hand-written DTOs + subscribe extraction), Track C (permission CLI — add/revoke/list/reset), Track D (multi-preset scheduler). Architect + PM dual review integrated. 8 risks registered. DEBT-RAND-073 moved from V1.6 to backlog (accept). Branch: feature/v1.6.

V1.7 delivery compass drafted (iterations/v1.7-delivery-compass-v1.md) + deferred-features-cross-version-tracker.md committed. 6 workstreams: WS-A/B/C (close 8 residuals — DTO-C1/C2/W1, PERM-W1/W2/W3, R4, R7), WS-D (ACP SDK v0.11.0+ migration), WS-E (multi-agent worker — XL, OQ-7), WS-F (capability schema registry sharing — M). Branch: feature/v1.7. Draft — pending user confirmation.

V1.29 COMPLETE: Author Intelligence & Agent Hardening. 6 plans Done (FL-A1 session review, FL-A2 SOUL Experience, FL-A3 Stage0 delimiters, FL-B KB extract queue, Agent Host Batch 2, spec hygiene). 23 commits, 58 files, +3368/-305 lines. QC tri-review Approve, QA Pass with residuals (R14–R20 deferred to V1.30). FL-A/FL-B shipped; DF-21–23/27–28 closed; DF-35/36 partial; R11/R12/R13 closed. Integration branch merged to main. AGENTS.md merge discipline rule added (PR-only).
V1.36 iteration plans archived per Profile B (6 Done rows removed from status.json.plans[]; snapshots in archived/plans/; catalog in archived/plans-done.json). V1.37 active.
Pre-V1.37 plan compaction: archived 11 Done rows from status.json.plans[] (v1.33 + v1.35) to archived/plans/ per Profile B.

V1.49 SHIPPED (2026-06-17) via PR #62 → main at d160379ff5a6. 6 plans Done (P-1 + P0-P3 + P-last); 19 carry-forward to V1.50. 3 Draft overlays folded into Masters (findings-lifecycle.md, narrative-indexes.md, author-experience §8). Wire contracts unchanged (compass §0.1 #8). Profile B compaction done (5 plans archived). Integration branch iteration/v1.49 retired.

V1.50 SHIPPED (2026-06-17) via PR #63 → main at 4db0a37b3e6a01836d8d90f968c75bcdd89754fc. 9 plans Done (P-1 + 4 cron/chronology + 3 KB + P-last); 16 residuals closed (6 V1.49 carry-forwards + 10 V1.50 WL-A); 8 carry-forward to V1.51+. 2 Draft overlays promoted (cron-staggering + auto-chronology) into workflow-profile.md §11 + entity-scope-model.md §5.5 Draft → Normative. Wire contracts unchanged. 8 DB migrations landed. Profile B compaction done (8 plans archived). Integration branch iteration/v1.50 retired.

V1.51 SHIPPED (2026-06-19) via PR #64 → main at c57b927bbf8621adf7ec59095d274f17f429c9b7. 7 plans Done (P-1 + T-A P0-P2 + T-B P0-P1 + P-last); 8 residuals closed (4 V1.50 carry-forwards + 4 V1.51 WL-A); 6 deferred to V1.52+. 6 spec overlays promoted Draft → Normative (concurrency.md, llm-extract.md, quality-loop §12, entity-scope §5.5.2, cli-spec §6.2G, world-kb-runtime-architecture). Wire contracts unchanged (compass §0.1 #8). Profile B compaction done (7 plans archived). Post-merge CI fix: 4-leg rust-tests job matrix (commit 477aafbe, +32/-4 in .github/workflows/ci.yml only) to fit ephemeral runner disk budget. Integration branch iteration/v1.51 retired.

harness hygiene: status.json metadata simplified (dropped 5 redundant fields, slimmed latest_ship 16→13 + tech_debt_summary 8→6); v1_49/v1_50/v1_51 root-level iteration_complete + status fields removed and migrated to .mstar/notes.json (structured data already in .mstar/archived/plans-done.json iteration_summaries). AGENTS.md branch_naming rule corrected: integration is iteration/{ver} (was feature/<ver>-<iteration-slug>); hotfix rule added (fix/{short-name} per V1.42.1 pattern).
